subcodes.first_line: O thou who servest the servants of the All-Merciful with spirit and sweet fragrance! By thy life, this is a station wherein thou shouldst glory amongst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من خدم عباد الرحمن بالروح و الریحان لعمرک هذا شان ینبغی ان تفتخر به بین
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
